query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.preConMonths, s.item_key, s.start_month, s.end_month, s.distribution_method FROM project_cash_flow_settings s JOIN projects p ON s.project_id = p.id WHERE s.item_key IN ('design_fee', 'developer_fee_design') ORDER BY p.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.preConMonths, s.item_key, s.start_month, s.end_month, s.distribution_method FROM project_cash_flow_settings s JOIN projects p ON s.project_id = p.id WHERE s.item_key IN ('design_fee', 'developer_fee_design') ORDER BY p.id;
